name: Kerevitas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
summary: Kerevitas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. produces and trades in frozen foods in Turkey. The company offers frozen and canned products, including bakery products, such as pizza, pastry, puff, pastry, Turkish ravioli, flatbread, and Turkish pizza; fruits and vegetables; meat products comprising meatballs, burgers, and chicken products; tuna fish and sweet corn; desserts, consisting of Knafeh, pistachio pastry, and mosaic cake; and seafood products, such as calamari and shrimps under the SuperFresh brand. It also provides margarine, pastry and catering, and industrial and edible oils under the Bizim Yag, Teremyag, Luna, Sabah, Yayla, Halk, Ona, Evet, Ustam, Akbis, Akao, Akrim, Arma, Mars, and SPY brand names. It is also involved in the generation of electricity; and production, trading, marketing, and export of agricultural and animal products. It offers its products through dealers and direct distribution channels, as well as exports its products to approximately 60 countries in Africa, Asia, Europe, South America, and North America. The company was founded in 1970 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Kerevitas Gida Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is a subsidiary of Yildiz Holding A.S.
